subcodes.first_line: O my God! Verily, Thou hast created the universe and fashioned the human soul. Thou hast brought forth the entire creation
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انک انت یا الهی قد خلقت الاکوان و برئت الانسان و ذرئت الموجودات و اوجدت
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @creation of the world, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @primordial Covenant; the day of alast, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
